text.title: Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: NOT LEGAL ADVICE — confirms advisor engagement

forbidden.pattern: advisor_engaged is empty AND first sale completed

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: residence_country populated with a typed value
entity_shape populated with a typed value
mor_decision populated with a typed value
advisor_engaged populated with a typed value
registration_thresholds populated with a typed value
banking_picks populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
disclaimer populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
